dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.leadIntro: Run scans with your free account. Upgrade for more tools and higher limits.
dashboard.proIntro: Run scans, use AI tools and calculators, or manage your account.
dashboard.upgradeDesc: 25 scans per month, AI tools, calculators and full reports.
dashboard.startFirstScan: Start your first scan to see scores and reports here.
dashboard.noScansYet: No scans yet. Start your first scan to see results here.
dashboard.openReportForAdvice: Open a report for AI advice on SEO, performance, UX and conversion.
dashboard.runScanForAdvice: Run a scan to get AI advice.
dashboard.growthPlaceholder: We show growth opportunities here once you have scan data.
dashboard.websiteScansDesc: Run AI website scans. Get scores for SEO, performance, UX and conversion.
dashboard.aiToolsDesc: Copy generator, site builder, competitor analysis, funnel builder.
dashboard.calculatorsDesc: ROI, break-even, pricing impact and more.
dashboard.portalAccess: Access your client portal for projects, invoices and support.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Current plan, usage and subscription management.
billing.manageSubscriptionDesc: Change your plan, view invoices or update payment details via the Stripe portal.
billing.upgradeDesc: Pro and Agency offer more AI usage, calculators and projects.
billing.limitReached: Limit reached for {type}. Upgrade for more.

errors.dashboardMessage: Something went wrong loading the dashboard. You can try again or go back to the home page.
errors.aiToolsMessage: AI tools could not be loaded. Check your connection and try again.
errors.calculatorsMessage: Calculators could not be loaded. Try again or go back to the dashboard.
errors.genericMessage: The page could not be loaded. Try again or go back to the dashboard.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to manage your dashboard and website scans.
auth.loginErrorLockout: Too many failed attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.
auth.loginErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
